title.en: Some of these Yae Ancestors were a little worri...

content.en:
"What's going on?"

Ye Tian looked at the red mountain peak in front of him with some shock, revealing a look of surprise.

And the other Yae Ancestors also noticed the situation of the red peak, and they all didn't know why.

Some of these Yae Ancestors were a little worried and prepared to retreat.

After all, if something happens and you encounter danger, wouldn't it be dangerous if you stayed here?

Abrupt.

Some red material seeped out of the red peaks, and these substances formed a red mist that spread.

Whew!!

One by one, the Eightfold Ancestors retreated, not daring to touch these red substances.

Although it is not easy for them to sense these red substances, they naturally do not risk touching them when they are not sure whether they are good or bad.

Although Ye Tian was not afraid of danger, he did not deliberately attract the attention of others, so he also retreated.

......

Cutting off the depths of the Yellow Tower, Shi Chao Dao Ancestor's gaze passed through the Truncated Black Mountain and looked at the red peak.

"It seems that there has been a little change in the truncation of the forbidden area, and a gap has been opened, this red substance should be the red light of the soul split!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor muttered.

He had not entered the Truncated Forbidden Zone in the depths of the time and space of the Truncated Mountain Range, but there had been a clone of the Nine Primordial Ancestors who had entered, and although he had fallen, he had also come up with some information.

For example, the Soul Splitting Red Light is common in the Truncated Forbidden Zone, and there are many places where this Soul Splitting Red Light is found.

This kind of soul-splitting red light can erode Dao Ancestor's will, and if his will is not strong, he won't be able to last long at all.

Even the Half-Step Ninefold Ancestor couldn't last long under the erosion of the Soul Splitting Red Light, and once it was eroded by the Soul Splitting Red Light for too long, the Half-Step Ninefold Ancestor would fall.

Of course, if you persevere, your will will be improved, and even transformed.

However, it is too dangerous to do so!

"This soul-splitting red light leaked a little, these Dao Ancestors can absorb a little bit and refine their will, if they can't hold on, they can retreat, if they are cutting off the forbidden area, they can't retreat if they want to!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor muttered.

He didn't go over, after all, even if he did, he wouldn't dare to enter the Forbidden Zone through the crack, and the Soul Splitting Red Light was of little use to him.

So, after he informed those Dao Ancestors, he didn't pay attention anymore.

......

"Soul Breaker Red Light!"

Ye Tian knew the origin of this red mist from the Nine-Story Building at this moment, and it turned out to be from the Truncated Forbidden Zone in the depths of the time and space of the Truncated Mountain Range.

According to the statement given by the Nine-Fold Building, the Soul Splitting Red Light will erode the will, and if it is eroded too severely, the half-step Ninefold Ancestor will fall.

But if you persevere, your will will improve.

"Maybe this is an opportunity to boost my will a lot!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, due to the existence of the Soul Splitting Red Light, those Eightfold Origin Ancestors could no longer cultivate, after all, even the entire red mountain peak was covered by the Soul Splitting Red Light, so they had no way to get close.

And these Eightfold Primordial Ancestors didn't dare to absorb the Soul Splitting Red Light, otherwise if their will was damaged, it would take a long time to recover.

So, these Eightfold Primordial Ancestors left one by one, but a few Eightfold Primordial Ancestors tried to absorb the Soul Splitting Red Light, but their faces were distorted, and they didn't last long, so they ran away.

Unconsciously, there was only one eightfold ancestor left here.

"Try it!"

Ye Tian came to the Soul Splitting Red Light and reached out to touch it.

Airplanes!!!

The red light of Soul Splitting invaded Ye Tian's will along his arm.

Suddenly, an unimaginable pain struck, but Ye Tian felt that it was okay, after all, he often endured the pain caused by copying talents, so he was not afraid of this pain.

Under the erosion of the red light of the Soul Split, his will continued to collapse, but some of the will particles that did not collapse seemed to be strengthened a little.

In this way, Ye Tian kept insisting, even if his will collapsed, he did not choose to leave here.

As the slow passage passed, Ye Tian's will was gradually about to completely collapse, and his body began to crack and shatter.

Just before this body was completely scrapped, he left here, and then found a place where no one was, annihilated the duplicate body, and then copied another copy of the body and came here again to practice.

In this way, others will only suspect that he has the means to quickly recover his will, and they will never expect that he has changed his body.

In the following days, Ye Tian sacrificed his replica body again and again to exercise his will.

In this way, his will became stronger and stronger, not only in quantity and in quality.

Originally, Ye Tian's will was comparable to the ordinary eightfold original ancestor peak, compared to the will of the eightfold original ancestor peak of the nine-story building, it was too much worse.

But now, his will gradually caught up with the Dao Ancestors of the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building, and even gradually caught up with the Dao Ancestors of the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building.

Not only that, but the quality of his will was higher, gradually approaching the quality of the half-step Ninefold Primordial Ancestor's will!

Ye Tian was so crazy about refining his will, which naturally attracted the attention of the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor.

However, he was not interested in snooping into the secrets of a junior, he only felt that Ye Tian was very good and had high potential.

Moreover, with the existence of the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, other forces did not dare to deal with Ye Tian anymore, so Ye Tian could use the Soul Splitting Red Light here to exercise his will with peace of mind.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already cultivated a hundred billion Origin Domain Era here.

After such a long period of time, Ye Tian's other replica body Enlightenment Immeasurable Dao Prototype has greatly improved, although it has not yet reached the Great Achievement Infinite Dao Prototype, it is much stronger than the Infinite Dao Prototype that has just been Xiaocheng.

In addition, Ye Tian's will has improved too much, and it has formed a qualitative change.

this day.

Ye Tian's will has completed the real transformation, although it is not comparable to the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor in terms of quantity, but it is comparable to the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor in terms of quality!

"My will is about to touch the immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The will of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor is the Immeasurable Will, and once the Immeasurable Will is formed, and then the Immeasurable Dao is comprehended, the Immeasurable Will and the Immeasurable Dao can be combined with the Immeasurable Dao to form the Infinite Dao Domain unique to the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor.

Under the Immeasurable Dao Domain, even the Half-Step Ninefold Origin Ancestor had no power to resist, and would be easily suppressed.

It's like that Lonely Dao Ancestor, under the Immeasurable Dao Domain of the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, he can't even move.

This is the horror of the Infinite Dao Domain!

Although Ye Tian was still far, far away from condensing the Immeasurable Dao Domain, if he comprehended the true Immeasurable Dao in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm, and then condensed the Immeasurable Will, then he could form a weakened Immeasurable Dao Domain!

In this regard, Ye Tian is quite looking forward to it!
